description: Archived resolved residuals from V1.33 P4 (memory-review-closed-loop). V1.33 P4 fix waves (commits 26dc124, 026972d, 4455f09, fb390c2) closed the 4 critical residuals; V1.35 P0 (commit 4a4ba9d) recorded closure in status.json SSOT.

entries.title: POST /v1/local/memory/review + GET /v1/local/memory/fragments enforce active creator from auth context
entries.target: Resolved by V1.33 P4 fix wave (commit 26dc124) — handlers use read_active_creator_id + AuthRequired (matches V1.32 SEC-V131-01 baseline).
entries.closure_evidence: commit 26dc124 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop integration; nexus_home::read_active_creator_id gate at handler entry.
entries.v1.35_p0_revalidation: 2026-06-07 — code verified at iteration/v1.35 HEAD; closure promoted to status.json SSOT (commit 4a4ba9d).
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit 26dc124 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop integration; nexus_home::read_active_creator_id gate at handler entry.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: memory_review_fragments_api.rs tests cover 401/403/404 + cross-creator isolation (was 200/400 only)
entries.target: Resolved by V1.33 P4 fix wave (commit 26dc124) — 5 new tests covering 401 (no creator), 403 (creator mismatch), 404 (cross-creator isolation); matches works_api.rs coverage bar.
entries.closure_evidence: commit 26dc124 adds memory_review_fragments_api.rs tests; hermetic setup matches works_api.rs pattern.
entries.v1.35_p0_revalidation: 2026-06-07 — code verified at iteration/v1.35 HEAD; closure promoted to status.json SSOT (commit 4a4ba9d).
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit 26dc124 adds memory_review_fragments_api.rs tests; hermetic setup matches works_api.rs pattern.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: PassthroughSummarizer prepends UNTRUSTED header (creator_id, session_id, captured_at) + 256 KiB size cap
entries.source: qc2 C-003 (V1.33 P4); also implementer Completion Report §7 nuance #2
entries.target: Resolved by V1.33 P4 fix waves (commits 026972d initial UNTRUSTED header + size cap; 4455f09 completeness fix after QA caught R-V133P4-03 incomplete) — header now includes creator_id + captured_at for downstream consumers.
entries.closure_evidence: commits 026972d + 4455f09 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop; QA recheck 6b09fd6 verified completeness.
entries.v1.35_p0_revalidation: 2026-06-07 — code verified at iteration/v1.35 HEAD; closure promoted to status.json SSOT (commit 4a4ba9d).
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commits 026972d + 4455f09 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop; QA recheck 6b09fd6 verified completeness.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: 4 pending-review CRUD handlers (create, list, count, delete) enforce active creator
entries.target: Resolved by V1.33 P4 fix wave 2 (commit fb390c2) — 4 legacy handlers now use read_active_creator_id + AuthRequired + 4 new tests covering 401/403 for each.
entries.closure_evidence: commit fb390c2 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop; qc1-wave2 caught the gap and reported it; P4 implementer applied same fix to all 4 handlers.
entries.v1.35_p0_revalidation: 2026-06-07 — code verified at iteration/v1.35 HEAD; closure promoted to status.json SSOT (commit 4a4ba9d).
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit fb390c2 on feature/v1.33-work-experience-loop; qc1-wave2 caught the gap and reported it; P4 implementer applied same fix to all 4 handlers.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).
! column alias suffix already removed in prior wave (V1.33 closeout); code has SAFETY comment.
save_memory already uses atomic tmp+rename pattern (V1.33 closeout).
Added MAX_DIGEST_BYTES (256 KiB) size guard in promote_to_long_term. Test: promote_truncates_oversized_raw_digest. Hygiene wave Fix 1 also added UTF-8 boundary safety.
